\tzpentry{ID5536}{Orbital Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5536 introduces Orbital Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \text{Orbital frequency:} &\quad \Omega_i = \dot{\phi}_i, \\[4pt] \text{Spin frequency:} &\quad \omega_i = \dot{\theta}_i, \\[4pt] \text{Phase-slip magnitude:} &\quad S_i(t) = \left| \phi_i(t) - \phi_i(t-\tau_{\rm drop}) - \Delta\phi_{\rm drop} \right|. \end{align}
